caption: The video features a man standing behind a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in a bright yellow traditional outfit with an orange and white scarf draped over his shoulders. The background displays a colorful illustration of architectural structures, possibly temples or historical buildings, along with some greenery. As he speaks, he gestures with his right hand, pointing upwards to emphasize a point. The setting appears to be a formal event or ceremony, likely outdoors given the natural light and open space visible around him. His expression and body language suggest that he is engaged and passionate about the topic he is discussing.
